title: crocanthemum nutans
intro: Crocanthemum nutans, also known as frostweed, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the aster family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of frostweed include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cold and flu symptoms, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of frostweed can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in topical applications to soothe and calm irritated skin.
